Project.Name: Wandsworth - Station Road - 7x 50kW DC Rapid Installation

Task.Name: Wandsworth - Station Road - 7x 50kW DC Rapid Installation
Electrical Design & Load Calculations
Task.Notes: Charger equipment delivery delayed - supplier backlog. Permit approval delayed by local authority review backlog. Design amendments required following review. Uncharted utility strike during excavation.
